category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes t2sz as compressing files into seekable zstd with special handling for .tar archives.
source_facts.description says it compresses files into seekable zstd with per-file seeking for tar archives.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is martinellimarco/t2sz.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/martinellimarco/t2sz, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies seekable zstd compression and tar archive handling.
